description_long: This is a modern single-story house surrounded by lush landscaping, including several large deciduous trees and flowering shrubs. The house features a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design with large windows that allow for ample natural light. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some sections featuring light gray accents. There is an attached garage visible on one side, and the main entryway is marked by a small porch area with a pathway leading up to it. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is open, with outdoor garden spaces integrated into the design.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and lush surrounding trees and gardens.
description_view_0: The house is partially obscured by dense trees, with the flat roof and some windows visible through the foliage.
description_view_1: This view shows the front of the house, including the main entryway, attached garage, and a clear pathway leading to the door.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible, with more windows and garden areas, and trees framing the structure.
description_view_3: The side of the house is shown, with a mix of windows and trees, and the flat roof extending over the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, pathway, and minimalistic door design, no prominent decorative elements.
